post.summary: To process multiple requests in a single API call
post.description: This API allows clients to bundle multiple API requests into a single HTTP request

schema.description: Request body for composite API operations

rollback_on_fail.description: Whether to rollback all operations if any sub-request fails. Default is false. Cannot be true when parallel_execution is true

parallel_execution.description: Whether to execute sub-requests concurrently. Default is true. Cannot be true when rollback_on_fail is true

__composite_requests.description: Array of individual API requests to be executed

uri.description: URI path for the API request

200.description: Success response when all sub requests are executed

schema.description: Response object containing successful composite request results

207.description: few sub requests are executed and few of them are not executed

schema.description: Response object for partial success when some sub-requests succeed and others fail

__composite_requests.description: Array of mixed success and error responses for individual sub-requests

items.description: Individual sub-request response containing either success or error details

400.description: error responses due to invalid input

schema.description: Error response schema for composite request failures

oneOf.description: Error response object with detailed error information

code.description: Error code indicating the type of error

oneOf.description: Error details for invalid data type

api_name.description: Name of the API that caused the error

json_path.description: JSON path to the problematic field

expected_data_type.description: Expected data type for the field

oneOf.description: Error details for missing mandatory fields

api_name.description: Name of the API that caused the error

json_path.description: JSON path to the problematic field

ambiguity_due_to.description: List of ambiguous references causing the error

api_name.description: Name of the API with ambiguous reference

json_path.description: JSON path to the ambiguous reference

oneOf.description: Error details for exceeding maximum length

api_name.description: Name of the API that caused the error

json_path.description: JSON path to the problematic field

oneOf.description: Error details for regex validation failure

sub_request_indexes.description: Indexes of sub-requests involved in the loop

oneOf.description: Error details for regex and data type validation

api_name.description: Name of the API that caused the error

json_path.description: JSON path to the problematic field

expected_data_type.description: Expected data type for the field

rollbacked_by_sub_request_index.description: Index of the sub-request that triggered the rollback

referred_sub_request_ids.description: IDs of sub-requests this depends on
